articles.title: STEPHEN MOORE: Foreign drug price controls are a hidden tax on Americans
articles.summary: The U.S. pays more for drugs because foreign governments cap prices, creating trade distortions that shift pharmaceutical costs onto Americans.

articles.title: The real reason your electric bill is soaring this summer will surprise you
articles.summary: Exelon CEO explains why electric bills rose nearly 30% between 2021 and 2025 and calls for an all-of-the-above energy strategy to boost supply.

articles.title: Maryland sheriffs should not be handcuffed by reckless sanctuary politics
articles.summary: Seventeen Maryland sheriffs challenge the state's Community Trust Act in a federal lawsuit filed by FAIR, calling the sanctuary law unconstitutional.

articles.title: Hilton, Becerra, in the lead with votes still being counted in battle for California governor
articles.summary: With votes still to be counted, Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra in the driver's seat to grab the two spots in California's general election for governor.

articles.title: From courts, critics and his own party, Donald Trump runs smack into reality
articles.summary: President Trump is confronting a series of challenges that show even the most dominant political figures can run into reality.

articles.title: South Dakota governors race remains up in the air as GOP contest goes to runoff
articles.summary: Gov. Larry Rhoden is projected to survive an upset attempt by popular Rep. Dusty Johnson in South Dakota's crowded GOP gubernatorial primary Tuesday.

articles.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama GOP-backed congressional map for midterms
articles.summary: The Supreme Court ruled Alabama can use a 2023 congressional map with one majority-Black district, handing Republicans a victory ahead of midterms.

articles.title: Trump-endorsed Feenstra concedes to MAHA-backed Lahn in GOP governor primary upset
articles.summary: Zach Lahn’s surprise win over Trump-backed Rep. Randy Feenstra sets up a November matchup with Democratic State Auditor Rob Sand in a race both parties are watching closely.

articles.title: Booker set to face Navy vet after former local NJ official lost in 2024 Senate race
articles.summary: U.S. Sen. Cory Booker will take on Justin Murphy in November as he attempts to win re-election, after Murphy won New Jersey's GOP primary for U.S. Senate on Tuesday.

articles.title: Gregg Hull wins New Mexico GOP gubernatorial primary, setting up bid to flip governor’s office
articles.summary: New Mexico's GOP gubernatorial primary produced a nominee Tuesday as Republicans aim to reclaim the governor's office for the first time since 2019.

articles.title: Tomas Hertl scores game-winner as Golden Knights rally to beat Hurricanes in Game 1 of Stanley Cup Final
articles.summary: Vegas Golden Knights erase a 2-0 deficit to beat the Carolina Hurricanes 5-4 in Game 1 of the Stanley Cup Finals on Tomas Hertl's late winner.

articles.title: DOJ expands indictment against SPLC, alleging $4M secretly funneled to KKK and extremist groups

articles.summary: Putin and Tokayev signed a landmark $16.5 billion nuclear power plant deal, marking Russia's geopolitical victory in Central Asia, reports say.

articles.title: Israel accuses UN of placing it on same sexual violence blacklist as Hamas terrorists, severs ties

articles.title: Crash involving speeding train, minibus in Belgium leaves 4 dead including 2 children

articles.summary: A toll booth attendant was killed in Daytona Beach Shores after a pickup truck rammed the structure. The driver allegedly smelled of alcohol.
